name: Unique User IDs for CDE Access
description: Ensures all users have unique IDs and shared/group accounts are not used (PCI DSS 8.1.1)
query: SELECT id, username, account_type, system_name FROM user_accounts WHERE cde_access = true AND (account_type = 'shared' OR account_type = 'group')
remediation: Replace shared accounts with unique individual user accounts. Assign unique user IDs to all users.
